zh.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan是Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan和Oda de Conteville的女兒，於1005年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯。她於大約1020年與Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville在英國英格蘭貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1081年4月8日在法國巴-諾門迪奧內諾曼德爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan是Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan和Oda de Conteville的女儿，于1005年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯。她于大约1020年与Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville在英国英格兰貝德福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1081年4月8日在法国巴-諾門迪奧內諾曼德爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meulan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: "Adelina"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adeline  , which has enjoyed some favour in the English-speaking world. It was famously borne by the Spanish-born opera singer  Adelina Pattie  (  1843–1919 ).

en.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan was born in 1005, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France as the daughter of Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan and Oda de Conteville. She married Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville about 1020, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 April 1081, in Normandel, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan est née en 1005, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, fille de Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan et Oda de Conteville. Elle a épousé Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville environ 1020, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1081, à Normandel, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan wurde 1005 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Tochter von Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan und Oda de Conteville geboren. Sie hat um 1020 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. April 1081 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Normandel, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan è nata il nel 1005 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia come figlia di Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan e Oda de Conteville. Lei sposato Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville circa 1020, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 aprile 1081, nel Normandel, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulanは1005年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスでGaleran de Beaumont Comte de MeulanとOda de Contevilleの娘として生まれた。約1020年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでHugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1081年4月8日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンノーマンデルで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan(은)는 1005년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan(와)과 Oda de Conteville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1020년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1081년 4월 8일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 노먼들에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan nasceu em 1005, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França filha de Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan e Oda de Conteville. Ela casou-se com Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville aproximadamente 1020, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1081, em Normandel, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan родилась в 1005 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Её родителей звали Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan и Oda de Conteville. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville около 1020 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 апреля 1081 г. в местности нормандель, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Marie "Adelina" de Meulan nació en 1005, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia como hija de Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan y Oda de Conteville. Se casó con Hugh De Talbot Le baron de Cleuville aproximadamente 1020, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de abril de 1081, en Normandel, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
